name: baserow
description: Connect Codex to a token-protected Baserow MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Use your team's Baserow MCP server in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Baserow connects Codex to the DNHQ Baserow MCP endpoint using each teammate's own Baserow MCP token. The token is read from BASEROW_MCP_TOKEN or from a local .env file created by the setup script, so shared plugin files do not contain secrets.
defaultPrompt: Use Baserow to inspect my team data
